details:
ANICHESS RISING STARS TOURNAMENT #3
1. General Information
Platform: All matches will be played on https://www.anichess.com.
Final Stage Date: July 12, 2026.
Start Time: 12:00 UTC (20:00 HKT).
Held Place: Official Anichess Discord — discord.gg/anichess.
Total Participants: Strictly limited to 16 players.
Tournament Format: Single-Elimination Knockout bracket.
Match System: All matches (from Round 1 to the Grand Finals) are Best of 3 (BO3).
Time Control: 5 minutes + 2 seconds increment.
Mandatory Presence: All players must be present in discord.gg/anichess at the start of the tournament.
2. Finalists Selection & Confirmation
Eligibility: Players must have completed the registration form: https://forms.gle/9XGbYmgyP6PNHQbA7.
Eligibility Rules: Accounts must be registered after May 1, 2026. Exception: Top 3 winners from Lichess Qualifiers are eligible if registered on or after April 1, 2026
Selection Date: The 16 finalists are determined on July 10, 00:00 UTC (08:00 HKT).
Top 8 by Rating: The 8 highest-rated registered Lichess newcomers.
Top 2 Wild Cards: The 2 players with the most games played on Anichess between Jun 1, 00:00 UTC and Jul 10, 00:00 UTC.
Lichess Qualifiers V: The top 3 winners.
Lichess Qualifiers VI: The top 3 winners.
Substitutions: If a qualified player fails to confirm or is unable to play, their spot will be given to the next eligible player in the rating standings (9th place, 10th place, etc.).
Live Standings: Rankings can be tracked at https://anichesstracker.com/.
Confirmation Procedure: Finalists must confirm participation by July 11, 14:00 UTC (22:00 HKT) by sending a private message (DM) to @Apex960 on Lichess.
Status Update: All players who qualify for and participate in the Finals will no longer be considered Anichess Newcomers, and will not be eligible for future Rising Stars newcomer tournaments.
3. Match Procedure
Colors Rotation: Higher seed plays White in Game 1. Colors alternate: White (G1), Black (G2), White (G3).
Hosting: The player playing White creates the game via Custom Mode (anichess.com/pvp/custom) and shares the link in their Discord match branch.
Spell Strategy Rule: IMPORTANT!!! All spells used in a match MUST BE UNIQUE. Since every match is a BO3, players must be prepared to use up to 9 unique spells per match. Repeating any spell within the same match results in an immediate TECHNICAL LOSS for the game in which the repetition occurred. Be attentive!
Result Reporting: After each game, players must post the link to the completed match in Discord.
Draw Policy: Players will play another match (or as many matches as needed) to determine the winner.
Tie-break: In the event of a draw in the 3rd game, the players will play another match to determine the winner.
Order of Play: The 3rd Place Match will be played first, followed by the Grand Final.
Disconnects: Players are responsible for their own connection. No replays for disconnects.
Waiting Time: A 7-minute grace period is allowed. After 7 minutes, a technical loss may be issued.
4. Prize Pool ($600 USD in CHECK tokens)
1st Place: $200 | 2nd Place: $120 | 3rd Place: $80 | 4th Place: $40
5th-8th Places: $20 each | 9th-16th Places: $10 each
Payment Details:
Distribution: All prizes will be distributed in CHECK tokens.
Wallets: Prizes will be sent to the wallets linked to the players' Anichess accounts.
Conversion: The amount of tokens will be calculated based on the USD equivalent at the time of payout.
Payout Timeline: Prizes will be delivered within 2 days after the conclusion of the tournament.
Fair Play: Any disputes will be resolved by the Anichess referee team. All decisions are final.
